title: Part 2 – Entraînement 4 : questions Why / Which / pièges
instructions: Écoutez chaque question et les trois réponses. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.

items.audioText: Why was the factory closed last week? (A) Because of scheduled maintenance work. (B) It was closed on Friday. (C) The factory is in the industrial zone.
choices: Because of scheduled maintenance work.
It was closed on Friday.
The factory is in the industrial zone.

items.audioText: Which supplier did you end up choosing? (A) We went with FastPrint — they had the best price. (B) There were three suppliers to consider. (C) The contract was signed last month.
choices: We went with FastPrint — they had the best price.
There were three suppliers to consider.
The contract was signed last month.
items.explanation: "Which supplier" demande un nom précis. (A) donne le nom et la raison du choix.

items.audioText: Why hasn't the shipment arrived yet? (A) It left the warehouse on Monday. (B) There's been a customs delay. (C) The tracking number is on the invoice.
choices: It left the warehouse on Monday.
There's been a customs delay.
The tracking number is on the invoice.
items.explanation: "Why hasn't it arrived" demande une cause. (B) explique le retard douanier.

items.audioText: Which version of the presentation should I use? (A) Use the one with the updated sales figures. (B) The presentation was very well received. (C) It's saved on the shared drive.
choices: Use the one with the updated sales figures.
The presentation was very well received.
It's saved on the shared drive.
items.explanation: "Which version" demande un choix précis. (A) indique laquelle utiliser et pourquoi.

items.audioText: Why did they reschedule the board meeting? (A) Two board members couldn't attend the original date. (B) The meeting room was unavailable. (C) The agenda was sent yesterday.
choices: Two board members couldn't attend the original date.
The meeting room was unavailable.
The agenda was sent yesterday.
items.explanation: "Why did they reschedule" attend une explication. (A) donne la raison des indisponibilités.

items.audioText: Which office does Mr. Grant work in? (A) He manages the eastern region. (B) The Singapore office. (C) He's been with the company for five years.
choices: He manages the eastern region.
The Singapore office.
He's been with the company for five years.
items.explanation: "Which office" demande un lieu. (B) répond directement : le bureau de Singapour.

items.audioText: Why is the budget meeting being held today instead of next week? (A) The CFO is travelling next week. (B) The meeting room is on the third floor. (C) I'll prepare the financial summary.
choices: The CFO is travelling next week.
The meeting room is on the third floor.
I'll prepare the financial summary.
items.explanation: "Why" demande une raison. (A) explique que le DFO sera en déplacement la semaine prochaine.

items.audioText: Which department handles employee benefits? (A) Benefits are reviewed once a year. (B) Human Resources does. (C) You should check your employment contract.
choices: Benefits are reviewed once a year.
Human Resources does.
You should check your employment contract.
items.explanation: "Which department handles" attend un nom de service. (B) identifie les RH.

items.audioText: Why did the client cancel the order? (A) They found a cheaper alternative. (B) The order was placed last week. (C) We have a good relationship with that client.
choices: They found a cheaper alternative.
The order was placed last week.
We have a good relationship with that client.
items.explanation: "Why did the client cancel" demande une raison. (A) l'explique : une alternative moins chère.

items.audioText: Which floor is the accounting department on? (A) There are thirty people in accounting. (B) The sixth floor, near the elevator. (C) Accounting handles all invoices.
choices: There are thirty people in accounting.
The sixth floor, near the elevator.
Accounting handles all invoices.
items.explanation: "Which floor" demande un numéro d'étage. (B) répond précisément.
